SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.model

Class Minister

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.model.Minister
public class Minister extends Object
Represents a government minister responsible for one ministry. Tracks performance score, warnings, status, and monthly reports.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    ministry
    The ministry this minister manages.
    private List<Report>
    monthlyReports
    List of monthly reports used in annual review.
    private String
    name
    The minister's full name.
    private double
    score
    Performance score (0.0 - 100.0).
    private String
    status
    Current status: ACTIVE or FIRED.
    private int
    warnings
    Number of warnings received.

    Description
    Minister(String name, String ministry)
    Creates a new Minister with full score and no warnings.

  • Constructor Details

    • Minister

      public Minister(String name, String ministry)
      Creates a new Minister with full score and no warnings.
      Parameters:
      name - the minister's name
      ministry - the ministry name

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the minister's name.
      Returns:
      name string

    • getMinistry

      public String getMinistry()
      Returns the ministry this minister manages.
      Returns:
      ministry name

    • getScore

      public double getScore()
      Returns the minister's current performance score.
      Returns:
      score (0.0 - 100.0)

    • getWarnings

      public int getWarnings()
      Returns the number of warnings this minister has received.
      Returns:
      warning count

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the minister's current status.
      Returns:
      ACTIVE or FIRED

    • getMonthlyReports

      public List<Report> getMonthlyReports()
      Returns all monthly reports for this minister.
      Returns:
      list of Report objects

    • setScore

      public void setScore(double score)
      Sets the minister's performance score.
      Parameters:
      score - new score value

    • setWarnings

      public void setWarnings(int warnings)
      Sets the number of warnings.
      Parameters:
      warnings - new warning count

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the minister's status.
      Parameters:
      status - ACTIVE or FIRED

    • addMonthlyReport

      public void addMonthlyReport(Report r)
      Adds a monthly report to this minister's record. Used during annual review to evaluate performance.
      Parameters:
      r - the Report to add
